member.name: T:HFI.Wss.BleNusTransport
member.summary: BLE transport backed by the Nordic UART Service (NUS).
member.remarks: This is a low-level byte transport only. Outbound messages are written with response to the NUS RX characteristic, inbound messages arrive as notifications from the NUS TX characteristic, and writes are serialized so only one GATT write is in flight at a time. Device selection follows : when enabled, the transport scans for compatible BLE devices and chooses the best valid candidate; otherwise it requires an explicit or .

member.name: F:HFI.Wss.BleNusTransport.DefaultServiceUuid
member.summary: Gets the default Nordic UART Service UUID used to discover compatible BLE devices.

member.name: F:HFI.Wss.BleNusTransport.DefaultWriteCharacteristicUuid
member.summary: Gets the default Nordic UART Service write characteristic UUID used for outbound bytes.

member.name: F:HFI.Wss.BleNusTransport.DefaultNotifyCharacteristicUuid
member.summary: Gets the default Nordic UART Service notification characteristic UUID used for inbound bytes.

member.name: M:HFI.Wss.BleNusTransport.#ctor(HFI.Wss.BleNusTransportOptions)
member.summary: Creates a BLE transport from a fully specified options object.
member.param: BLE transport configuration including device selection and required UUIDs.
member.exception: Thrown when the supplied options are invalid.

member.name: M:HFI.Wss.BleNusTransport.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a BLE transport that connects to a device with the specified advertised name.
member.param: Exact BLE device name to scan for.

member.name: P:HFI.Wss.BleNusTransport.IsConnected
member.summary: Gets whether the transport currently has an active BLE session and both required GATT characteristics.

member.name: E:HFI.Wss.BleNusTransport.BytesReceived
member.summary: Raised when raw bytes are received from the BLE notification characteristic.
member.remarks: Handlers may be invoked on a background thread supplied by the underlying BLE stack. Marshal to the required context before touching thread-affine state.

member.name: M:HFI.Wss.BleNusTransport.ConnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously scans for and connects to the configured BLE device.
member.returns: A task that completes when the BLE session and required characteristics are ready.
member.exception: Thrown when the transport has been disposed.
Thrown when no compatible BLE device can be resolved or the required service and characteristics are unavailable.
Thrown when the operation is canceled.

member.name: M:HFI.Wss.BleNusTransport.DisconnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously disconnects the active BLE session and stops inbound notifications.
member.returns: A task that completes when platform-specific BLE resources have been released.
member.exception: Thrown when the operation is canceled.

member.name: M:HFI.Wss.BleNusTransport.SendAsync(System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a block of raw bytes over the BLE write characteristic.
member.returns: A task that completes when the write has been handed off to the platform BLE stack.
member.exception: Thrown when the transport has been disposed.
Thrown when the transport is not connected.
Thrown when the operation is canceled.
member.remarks: Writes are serialized so only one GATT write is in flight at a time.

member.name: M:HFI.Wss.BleNusTransport.Dispose
member.summary: Disconnects the transport and releases managed resources.
member.remarks: This method performs a best-effort synchronous disconnect and logs disconnect failures instead of rethrowing them.

member.name: M:HFI.Wss.BleNusTransport.CreateDefaultOptions(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a default options object that resolves a BLE device by advertised name.
member.param: Exact BLE device name to scan for.
member.returns: A new options object with set.

member.name: T:HFI.Wss.BleNusTransportOptions
member.summary: Configuration for .
member.remarks: When is , callers must provide either or . Scan-based operations honor when a timeout is configured.

member.name: P:HFI.Wss.BleNusTransportOptions.DeviceId
member.summary: Explicit BLE device identifier to connect to when is disabled. When provided, it takes precedence over .

member.name: P:HFI.Wss.BleNusTransportOptions.DeviceName
member.summary: Exact BLE device name to scan for when is disabled and is not provided.

member.name: P:HFI.Wss.BleNusTransportOptions.ServiceUuid
member.summary: Required BLE service UUID. Auto-select only considers devices that expose this service.

member.name: P:HFI.Wss.BleNusTransportOptions.WriteCharacteristicUuid
member.summary: Required BLE write characteristic UUID. Auto-select rejects devices that do not expose it with write-with-response support.

member.name: P:HFI.Wss.BleNusTransportOptions.NotifyCharacteristicUuid
member.summary: Required BLE notification characteristic UUID. Auto-select rejects devices that do not expose it with notify or indicate support.

member.name: P:HFI.Wss.BleNusTransportOptions.ScanTimeout
member.summary: Maximum scan duration used for configured-name lookup and auto-selection.

member.name: P:HFI.Wss.BleNusTransportOptions.AutoSelectDevice
member.summary: When true, scans for compatible BLE devices and auto-selects the best valid candidate. Auto-selection only accepts devices that expose the configured service and both required characteristics with the expected properties, then prefers stronger RSSI. When false, the caller must provide or .

member.name: T:Wss.CoreModule.SerialPortTransport
member.summary: Serial-port implementation of for WSS communications. Wraps and exposes an event-driven receive API that works well in Unity/.NET Standard 2.0.

remarks.para: Threading: is raised from a background task. If your app (e.g., Unity) requires main-thread processing, marshal the callback to the main thread before touching UI/GameObjects.
Chunking: Serial I/O does not preserve message boundaries. Each chunk may contain partial frames or multiple frames. Always pass chunks to a frame codec/deframer.
Timeouts: The read loop polls and catches s, which are normal with short read timeouts.

member.name: M:Wss.CoreModule.SerialPortTransport.#ctor(Wss.CoreModule.SerialPortTransportOptions)
member.summary: Creates a serial transport from a single options object.
member.param: Serial transport configuration, including connection settings and port selection mode.
member.exception: Thrown when the port selection settings specify both an explicit port and auto-selection, or neither.
member.remarks: Exactly one port selection mode must be configured: either set to or provide a non-empty .

member.name: E:Wss.CoreModule.SerialPortTransport.BytesReceived
member.remarks: This event is typically raised on a background thread by the internal read loop. Consumers should copy the buffer if it needs to be retained beyond the callback.

member.name: M:Wss.CoreModule.SerialPortTransport.ConnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks: Opens the serial port and starts a background read loop that forwards incoming data to .

member.name: M:Wss.CoreModule.SerialPortTransport.DisconnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks: Stops the background read loop and closes the serial port.

member.name: M:Wss.CoreModule.SerialPortTransport.SendAsync(System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks: Writes the buffer synchronously to the underlying and flushes the base stream.

member.name: M:Wss.CoreModule.SerialPortTransport.ReadLoopAsync
member.summary: Background task that polls the serial port and raises when data arrives.
member.remarks: The loop polls and performs short delays (2ms) when idle to reduce CPU usage. It exits on cancellation or unexpected exceptions.

member.name: M:Wss.CoreModule.SerialPortTransport.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the serial port and stops the read loop.

member.name: M:Wss.CoreModule.SerialPortTransport.GetComPort(System.String)
member.summary: Selects a serial port. Honors if available and falls back to platform-appropriate defaults.

member.name: T:Wss.CoreModule.SerialPortTransportOptions
member.summary: Holds connection settings for .
member.remarks: Exactly one port selection mode must be used: either set to true, or provide a non-empty .

member.name: P:Wss.CoreModule.SerialPortTransportOptions.PortName
member.summary: Gets or sets the explicit port name. Use values such as COM5 on Windows or /dev/ttyUSB0 on Linux/macOS. This must be provided when is false.

member.name: P:Wss.CoreModule.SerialPortTransportOptions.AutoSelectPort
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the transport should automatically select the best available serial port. When true, must be left empty.

member.name: P:Wss.CoreModule.SerialPortTransportOptions.Baud
member.summary: Gets or sets the baud rate. The default is 115200.

member.name: P:Wss.CoreModule.SerialPortTransportOptions.Parity
member.summary: Gets or sets the parity mode. The default is .

member.name: P:Wss.CoreModule.SerialPortTransportOptions.DataBits
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of data bits. The default is 8.

member.name: P:Wss.CoreModule.SerialPortTransportOptions.StopBits
member.summary: Gets or sets the stop-bit configuration. The default is .

member.name: P:Wss.CoreModule.SerialPortTransportOptions.ReadTimeoutMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the synchronous serial read timeout, in milliseconds. The default is 10.
